title: Tech hit, volatility pops — breadth uncertain into earnings
tag: QQQ led the downside while SPY/DIA/IWM held closer to flat; VIX rose, keeping the tape cautious into major reports.

spy.read: Pulled back from the 52-week highs; still in range but no free lunches

qqq.read: Clear laggard — growth/mega-cap pressure drove the risk-off tilt

dia.read: Held up better than tech; defensive/value tone relative to QQQ

iwm.read: Flat-ish — small caps steadier than tech today

sentiment.label: UNCERTAIN
sentiment.qualifier: index pullback led by QQQ with VIX higher

weather.volatility: VIX 16.73, up 6.76% on the day — risk premium waking up
weather.tone: Cautious and selective — protect entries, size down, and avoid chasing headlines

cluster: Leadership lane: DIA/IWM held up while QQQ took the hit — value/defensive over growth today
Key catalyst today: UnitedHealth, GE Aerospace, Netflix, Intuitive Surgical, Abbott, U.S. Bancorp, State Street, United Airlines, and Prologis reported today (7/16)
Secondary catalyst: Travelers, Truist, Fifth Third, Regions Financial, and Autoliv report tomorrow (7/17) — keep an eye on financials and cyclicals into the open
Small cap vs large cap: IWM (-0.06%) materially steadier than SPY (-0.54%) and QQQ (-1.64%) — growth weakness was the story
Broad participation: uneven — the tape looked like 'tech down, rest holds', not an all-clear
Rotation note: rotation away from mega-cap growth toward value/steady beta (relative strength in DIA/IWM)
Behavior rule: treat the QQQ selloff + VIX pop as a 'patience day' — no chasing breakdowns, no buying dips without clean structure
account: Mission for today: protect decision quality — observe first, act only on clean setups
Broker status: IB sandbox scoped, not yet connected; Schwab pending
Elevated event risk: tomorrow's financials cluster (TRV/TFC/FITB/RF) can shift index tone early
checklist: Data flow, broker connections, overnight positions, stop logic: monitoring data-only — no live broker connection yet
Core universe glance: SPY pullback; QQQ weak; DIA/IWM relatively steady
Day-specific catalyst note #1: major 7/16 reporters included NFLX, UNH, GE, ISRG, ABT, USB, STT, UAL, PLD
Day-specific catalyst note #2: 7/17 includes TRV, TFC, FITB, RF, ALV — watch premarket and the open
body_muted: When QQQ is the source of weakness and VIX is rising, the job is to stay patient: take only A+ structure, size appropriately, and let the tape prove stabilization.
_sources: SPY/QQQ/DIA/IWM/VIX quotes and market sentiment via finance_quotes and finance_market_sentiment (Perplexity Realtime Finance Data); earnings catalysts via finance_earnings_schedule.
